improvement_opportunities: Vary shot selection to include more drops and dinks to pull opponents to the kitchen.
Improve consistency on powerful drives to reduce unforced errors out of bounds.
Develop a more aggressive net game and transition play.

storytelling.narrative_arc_summary: A sustained rally of powerful drives concludes with an out-of-bounds shot, leading to a friendly paddle tap.

Player 1 consistently hits powerful drives throughout the rally.
Player 3 consistently returns multiple drives, keeping the rally alive.

commentary.neutral_announcer_espn: A solid rally unfolds on the indoor court, featuring a series of powerful drives from the near side. The far team demonstrates good defensive consistency, returning each shot until the final drive sails just long, concluding the point.
commentary.hype_announcer_charged: Boom! Back and forth they go, a relentless barrage of drives! This isn't just pickleball, it's a baseline battle, a test of wills! One last rip, but it just drifts wide! What a point, folks!
commentary.coaching_breakdown: Player 1, you're generating good power on those drives, but notice how predictable they become. Incorporate a drop shot or a dink to force your opponents to move forward, opening up the court for your power game. Also, watch that last drive; it went long because you likely overhit. Focus on keeping it in play with depth rather than pure pace.
commentary.social_media_caption: Drive it like you mean it! 💪 #PickleballRally
commentary.ron_burgundy_voice: Well, that was certainly a pickleball rally of some... duration. The ball, a vibrant yellow, traversed the court with a certain... vigor, only to find its final resting place just beyond the designated boundary. Remarkable.
commentary.chuck_norris_voice: Chuck Norris once played pickleball with a single glance. These mortals, however, engage in a spirited exchange of drives, a testament to their lesser, yet admirable, human effort.
commentary.color_commentator_banter: You know, it's always interesting to see a team that just loves to drive the ball. They're not looking for the soft game, they want to hit through you. And sometimes, like we saw there, that aggression can just barely miss the mark.
commentary.trash_talk_friendly: Almost had it! Next one's mine, buddy!
commentary.announcement_text_for_tts: A solid rally unfolds on the indoor court, featuring a series of powerful drives. The far team demonstrates good defensive consistency, returning each shot until the final drive sails just long, concluding the point.

daas_signals.clip_summary_one_sentence: A long pickleball rally of drives ends with an out-of-bounds shot and a friendly paddle tap.
